title: Christmas Maze Mania
description: Begin a festive journey in our Christmas maze game! Guide Santa using your mouse, touch, or keyboard through captivating mazes to bring joy to waiting children. Find optimal paths, deliver heartwarming gifts, and immerse yourself in holiday spirit across 15 challenging levels. Spread Christmas cheer in this enchanting game!
instructions: 31 Supported Languages 15 Challenging Levels Unique Holiday Backgrounds for Each Level Navigate with Mouse Touch and Keyboard Controls
